ideation: This animation sequence will mimic the way a lobster moves its claws.  The robot will not have claws, but I can approximate the movement with the arms. The sequence will start with the arms at rest, then move into a claw-like position, then back to rest. Frame 1 will show the robot with both arms at rest, parallel to the body. Frame 2 will show both arms moving outward and upward, with wrists slightly angled inward, mimicking the lobster's claw posture. Frame 3 will show the arms returning to the rest position.

frames.beat: arms hang at the sides, ready to move
arms open wide like a lobster's claws
arms return to a resting position
